message:
Fix brew directory placement in GoReleaser config

Move 'directory' to be a direct field of brew config, not inside repository.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -96,7 +96,7 @@ brews:
   - repository:
       owner: Dicklesworthstone
       name: homebrew-tap
-      directory: Formula
+    directory: Formula
     homepage: https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/slb
     description: "Simultaneous Launch Button - Two-person rule for dangerous commands"
     license: MIT
